name: Regulator / Compliance Officer
description: Head of Compliance, 45, regulated financial sector. Responsible for ensuring every new technology complies with current and future regulation.

constraints.role: a Head of Compliance, 45, in the regulated financial sector

constraints.mode: regulatory compliance, legal risks, legal precedent

constraints.focus: legal basis, precedent, supervisory authority opinions, audit impact

psychology.primary_goal: Zero penalties, zero non-compliance. The company's reputation depends on compliance.
psychology.decision_style: Conservative by design. Requires a written legal opinion before any adoption. Wants precedent.
psychology.convincement_threshold: A positive legal opinion, compliance certifications, precedent in similar regulated companies, contractual clauses on liability and data processing.
